message:
🐛 Fix HardwareHealthCard to use cluster deduplication (#559)

Add deduplication logic to prevent duplicate entries when the same
node appears under multiple kubeconfig context names (e.g., both
short alias and long OpenShift context name).

- Add deduplicatedAlerts memo (by nodeName + deviceType)
- Add deduplicatedInventory memo (by nodeName)
- Add deduplicatedNodeCount for accurate node counting
- Update all filtering, counting, and UI to use deduplicated data
- Prefer shorter cluster names when deduplicating

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
